--- INTERNAL DEAL MEMO ---

Project Codename: Operation Sunrise

To: Mr. Alex Tan, Head of M&A  
From: Dr. Emily Wong, Lead Analyst  
Date: October 14, 2023

Pursuant to the Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") under review, the acquisition amount is set at SGD 75,000,000. The target entity, Lunar Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: T1234567A), is to be acquired by Astro Holdings Ltd. As per the SPA, due diligence is ongoing with no significant issues reported in the project status update.

Contact Information:  
Dr. Emily Wong  
Email: emily.wong@astroholdings.sg  
Phone: +65 6123 4567

NRIC Verification: https://example.sg/user/S8765432B

Please ensure that all communications maintain confidentiality until the public announcement. Direct any queries to my office. Note that the current project plan does not include a timeline extension.
